services.name: OpenAI
services.description: Official OpenAI platform supporting GPT and embedding models with tool calling.

services.name: Anthropic
services.description: Claude Opus, Sonnet and Haiku connected through the OpenAI-compatible adapter.

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.tagline: OpenAI models hosted on Microsoft Azure
services.description: Enterprise-managed OpenAI deployments through your Azure subscription.

services.name: Amazon Bedrock
services.tagline: Anthropic, AI21, Meta and more on AWS
services.description: Bedrock Converse API supporting multiple foundation models from leading providers.

services.name: Google Vertex AI
services.tagline: Gemini family and embeddings on Google Cloud
services.description: Vertex AI generative and embedding models authenticated with a service account.

services.name: Together AI
services.tagline: Hosted open-source models with tool calling
services.description: Together AI APIs for Llama, Mistral and other community models.

services.name: Ollama

services.description: Run open-source models locally or on a private network through Ollama.

services.name: OpenAI-Compatible
services.tagline: Any service exposing the OpenAI REST schema

services.name: Cognipeer LLM
services.description: First-party Cognipeer inference endpoints with built-in routing and caching.

services.name: Chroma Cloud
services.description: Managed ChromaDB collections with automatic scaling.

services.name: Zilliz Cloud
services.description: Managed Milvus clusters operated by Zilliz Cloud.

services.description: Connect to a self-managed Milvus deployment.

services.name: Elasticsearch Cloud
services.description: Elasticsearch Service with vector search enabled.

services.name: Elasticsearch (self-hosted)
services.description: Connect a self-hosted Elasticsearch deployment.

services.name: Azure AI Search
services.description: Vector indexes via Azure Cognitive Search.

services.name: MongoDB Atlas
services.description: Use MongoDB Atlas Vector Search collections.

services.name: PostgreSQL (pgvector)

services.name: SQLite Vector
services.description: Lightweight on-disk vector storage backed by SQLite.

services.description: Store ingested files and artifacts in an S3 bucket.

services.name: Local filesystem
